fields.LeftSidewaysMode: How the left controller should be used to move the user.
fields.RightSidewaysMode: How the right controller should be used to move the user.
fields.UseHeadDirectionForMovement: Should head direction or controller direction in VR for movement direction.
fields.UseSmoothTurn: Whether smooth turning using joystick should be used.
fields.SmoothTurnExclusiveMode: Whether to use only smooth turning in all cases.
fields.SnapTurnAngle: How many degrees to change by when using snap turn mode.
fields.NoClipSpeed: How fast the user's noclip speed should be.
fields.MovementDeadzone: Any 0 to 1 value less than this is ignored for movement. (this is 0 to 1 range)
fields.TurningDeadzone: Any 0 to 1 value less than this is ignored for turning.(this is 0 to 1 range)
fields.MovementExponent: Pushes values from a 0 to 1 linear value to a quick ramp up effect still within a 0 to 1 range for movement speed input on the joysticks.
